name: TABLE TRAC INC
business: Table Trac, Inc. develops and sells casino management systems and table games management systems to casinos. It also offers technical support, maintenance, and ancillary products. As of December 31, 2025, it had systems installed with over 115 casino operators in over 300 casinos.
sellsTo: Casinos in Central and South America

exposures.sentence: The Company has developed and patented a proprietary information and management system (called our Table Trac system) that automates and monitors the operations of casino table game operations.
Any disruption in our software and related information technology systems due to a cyber incident could adversely affect our business, operating results and financial conditions.

catalysts.sentence: On January 1, 2026, Randy Gilbert was appointed Chief Executive Officer of the Company.

catalysts.event: Line of credit renewed through February 2027
catalysts.sentence: The Company has renewed this line of credit through February 2027.

catalysts.event: Signed four new contracts with customers in 2026
catalysts.sentence: As of the filing date of this report, the Company has signed four new contracts with customers in 2026.
